target: BAU batch: 5 href precision fixes + 2 §2b.1 count corrections + 39-domains anchor + Kill Shots narrative bridge + WIN-004 detail_extra (ISS-2249/2252/2253/2255/2256)

patches.find_pattern: href="#part1" onclick="showTab('model');return false;">Section 1.8 shows that solstice geometry
patches.replace_pattern: href="#section-1-8" onclick="showTab('model');return false;">Section 1.8 shows that solstice geometry

patches.find_pattern: href="#part1" onclick="showTab('model');return false;">Section 1.8 for the full cascade analysis
patches.replace_pattern: href="#section-1-8" onclick="showTab('model');return false;">Section 1.8 for the full cascade analysis

patches.description: §2b.1: Remove WIN-067 from monitoring=none Self-Contradicted list; fix count Seven→Six
patches.find_pattern: Seven are self-contradicted by the dome's own geometry (WIN-044/050/051 tidal, WIN-053 flux, WIN-056 solar, WIN-061 P-wave, WIN-067 gravity) — monitoring would expose the contradiction.
patches.replace_pattern: Six are self-contradicted by the dome's own geometry (WIN-044/050/051 tidal, WIN-053 flux, WIN-056 solar, WIN-061 P-wave) — monitoring would expose the contradiction.

patches.description: §2b.1: Fix cascading count (seven→six no-monitoring; seven→eight hardcoded; add WIN-067 to hardcoded list)
patches.find_pattern: six have no monitoring at all — but the other seven (WIN-002/012/029/038/045/046/049)
patches.replace_pattern: six have no monitoring at all — but the other eight (WIN-002/012/029/038/045/046/049/067)
patches.note: WIN-067 has code_analysis.monitoring='hardcoded' (verified in wins.json). Original text pre-patch read 'seven...seven'; corrected to 'six...eight'.

patches.description: §2b.1: Anchor '39 monitoring domains' count to V51.0 commit 8e4bf9b
patches.find_pattern: The script defines 39 monitoring domains — each a dictionary
patches.replace_pattern: At that commit, the script defines 39 monitoring domains — each a dictionary
patches.note: Commit 8e4bf9b already cited in the preceding sentence; 'At that commit' ties the count to the established context without repeating the full hash.

patches.description: Kill Shots outro: add narrative bridge pointing to Timestamp Error tab
patches.find_pattern: By any honest application of the dome's own binary rule, the kill-shot framework currently favors dome falsification, not globe falsification.
patches.replace_pattern:
By any honest application of the dome's own binary rule, the kill-shot framework currently favors dome falsification, not globe falsification.

For the methodology audit companion — why the dome's OpenTimestamps anchoring fails to establish genuine prospective prediction — see the Timestamp Error tab.

patches.description: WIN-004 detail_extra: integrate PRED-013 feasibility math (stagnated 4 cycles)
patches.replace_pattern: detail_extra: 'PRED-013 feasibility check. At current SAA-pole separation rate, linear extrapolation gives 74.4° by 2055. PRED-013 lower bound (120°) requires 2.92× current rate; upper bound (180°) requires 5.45× current rate.'

verification_notes.ISS-2249: All 5 imprecise hrefs confirmed fixed. 3x Section 1.8 (#part1→#section-1-8) in WIN-046/056/065. 1x Section 6.6 (#part6→#p6-66-5) in generate-html.js accuracy-math section. 1x Section 6.2 (#part6→#p6-62-1) in WIN-062. Verified no remaining #part1+1.8 or #part6+6.6 combos in built HTML.
verification_notes.ISS-2252: WIN-067 code_analysis.monitoring='hardcoded' confirmed in wins.json. Removed from §2b.1 monitoring=none list. Both paragraph counts updated (Seven→Six, seven→six no-monitoring, seven→eight hardcoded). WIN-067 added to hardcoded list. ISS explicitly stated §2b.2 citations are correct and need no change — second paragraph is also in §2b.1 and required matching count fixes.
verification_notes.ISS-2253: Added 'At that commit,' prefix to the 39-domains sentence. Commit 8e4bf9b already cited in immediately-preceding sentence, so this is the minimal anchor. Live-power '20-Domain Convergence Dashboard' uses a different display metric — the 39 count refers to monitoring domain dictionaries in monitor.py.
verification_notes.ISS-2255: Added italic bridge sentence in Kill Shots summary div outro, pointing to #timestamp-error with correct showTab('timestamp') handler. Text: 'For the methodology audit companion — why the dome's OpenTimestamps anchoring fails to establish genuine prospective prediction — see the Timestamp Error tab.'
verification_notes.ISS-2256:
WIN-004 detail_extra was null for 4 consecutive cycles (c4-c7). Set to PRED-013 feasibility math as curmudgeon recommended. Text does not start with

to avoid double-wrap; build template provides the paragraph container.
